steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: The text has two independent clauses: many works are lost, and Geographica is extant. The conjunctive adverb "Conversely" needs a strong boundary before it.

steps.title: Reject weak boundaries
steps.content: B and D use "and conversely," an awkward additive link for a contrast. C creates a comma splice between independent clauses. The remaining option ends the first sentence and introduces the contrast correctly. The answer is A.
